review_body: The professor clearly doesn't care about students. Spent most lectures reading off slides and refused to answer questions. Avoid unless you enjoy wasting a semester.
Complete waste of time. This person only cares about their own research papers and treats students as free labour. Never responds to emails, ghosted me for 3 months during thesis.
The TAs are absolutely useless and the prof is worse. No one knows anything. Office hours are a joke. Total disaster.
Do NOT work with this professor. Takes students on and then ignores them completely. The research is dead-end and the lab has no real funding. You will regret it.
The workload is inhuman and completely unreasonable. Grading is random and arbitrary. No feedback given on assignments.
